channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 0 com severidade Crítica
• 12 com severidade Alta
• 17 novas CVEs
• 2 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-45082 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.6
Resumo:
Karakeep is a elf-hostable bookmark-everything app. A Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) protection bypass vulnerability was identified in versions prior to 0.32.0 affecting redirect-following processing components. Although the application implements protections intended to prevent requests toward internal/private network destinations, these protections could be bypassed through crafted HTTP redirect chains. By leve...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-45082
 
📰 Open Source DockSec Uses AI to Cut Through Vulnerability Noise in Docker Images - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia trata de uma falha de execução remota de código relacionada a Docker, com potencial impacto importante em ambientes expostos ou mal segmentados.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 The Untrusted Autonomous Workload: How AI Coding Agents Reshape What Isolation Has to Do
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: https://www.docker.com/blog/feed/
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Earlier this year I mass-migrated my blog to Astro using Claude Code. Canonical URLs, JSON-LD markup, sitemap generation, the whole stack. I'd spent hours writing a skills file to teach the agent about my blog's architecture, how deployment worked, what not to touch.
Link: https://www.docker.com/blog/untrusted-autonomous-workload-ai-sandboxes/
 
📰 VMware Cloud on AWS の使用状況を確認できる API
 
Criticidade: Baixa
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a ESX no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/vmware-japan/2026/05/vmc-usage-report.html
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Microsoft Patches SharePoint RCE Flaw CVE-2026-45659 Across Server Versions
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
Microsoft has rolled out updates to fix a remote code execution vulnerability impacting SharePoint that could be exploited by bad actors in attacks without requiring any specialized conditions to be met. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-45659, carries a CVSS score of 8.8. "Deserialization of untrusted data in Microsoft Office SharePoint allows
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/microsoft-patches-sharepoint-rce-flaw.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-48135 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.3
Resumo:
A Check Point HTTP-based service can incorrectly handle malformed HTTP requests. The issue is related to HTTP request parsing and validation.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-48135
 
💣 CISA orders feds to patch actively exploited Drupal vulnerability
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
government agencies until Wednesday evening to secure their servers against an SQL injection vulnerability in the Drupal content management system (CMS) that it flagged as actively exploited.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/cisa-orders-feds-to-patch-actively-exploited-drupal-vulnerability/
 
💣 KnowledgeDeliver LMS Flaw Exploited to Deploy Godzilla and Cobalt Strike
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Qualys. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/05/knowledgedeliver-lms-flaw-exploited-to.html
 
📰 7-Eleven data breach exposes personal information of 185,000 people
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
The ShinyHunters extortion gang stole the personal information of over 183,000 people after hacking the systems of convenience store chain giant 7-Eleven in April, according to data breach notification service Have I Been Pwned.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/7-eleven-data-breach-exposes-personal-information-of-185-000-people/
 
📰 Microsoft Defender can now automatically isolate hacked endpoints
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Microsoft is testing a new Defender for Endpoint capability that will automatically isolate compromised endpoints to thwart attackers' attempts to move laterally across the network.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/microsoft/microsoft-defender-can-now-automatically-isolate-hacked-endpoints/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 USN-8305-1: Linux kernel (Intel IoTG Real-time) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that the Linux kernel algif_aead module did not properly handle in-place cryptographic operations. A local attacker could use this to escalate privileges, or possibly escape a container. (CVE-2026-31431) Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - Cryptographic AP...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8305-1
 
🚨 USN-8304-1: Vim vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Joshua Rogers discovered that Vim incorrectly handled certain URL schemes in the netrw plugin. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary commands. (CVE-2026-42307) It was discovered that Vim incorrectly handled command-line completion for the :find command. An attacker could possibly use this issue to execute arbitrary commands. (CVE-2026-44656) Daniel Cervera discovered that Vim incorrectly hand...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8304-1
 
🚨 USN-8291-3: Linux kernel (Low Latency) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - SMB network file system; - Netfilter; - io_uring subsystem; (CVE-2024-35862, CVE-2024-50060, CVE-2026-23274, CVE-2026-23351)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8291-3
 
🚨 CVE-2026-8174 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.7
Resumo:
Zohocorp Zoho Mail wordpress plugin is vulnerable to Cross-Site request forgery (CSRF). This issue affects Zoho Mail wordpress plugin versions before 1.6.2.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8174
 
📰 Best Ransomware Protection Platforms for Enterprise Security Teams (2026 Guide) - Morphisec
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxNRHRCMVVwcFdUQWtRcW1FajFSVHRVUkFMRnhfbWlEQXp2a2M5bHY2NXBBUGd1UHEzYVMyYlJnb1BjdDNCek5ubUpCV29EdzNyeEZEX0xhemZhUDhXMUZHV25uaUtpWlFRWW1zM0RNNURXX0p5aFpfc0x4YWMyQkpIVTVQU1JhaWpqY0cxTGkyWkdpQ3FCT1k0SjNQelV5b0FmQmZIb0RaM25ZSkpXc3c?oc=5
 
📰 FBI warns Microsoft 365 users about another phishing as a service attack – here's how to avoid it - IT Pro
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Office
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Office, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxOb25QMUlQREY5OWNoZDNGQjAwYlVvVk90Z2N5b05RRHU5Slp6N1gwNGZad0NldjNpQnRUSk80SWp6VU1VY2FzbVZqRy1NNVZKQ3BxaXc1a3ZEbWUybURaMUh1V1pnNkhwb29mMmp3ZGptTUFEanpmTGJiQmdhT3RWbmRVOTRnWjlJOWl5V3JZeDh4elZyRXU4T21QUU5aUEc4ZGlEUEVTcXBnX0F3ZWx2SldxTjY5dUpXd1lacjZBaTZwTlU?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias dos dias 25/05/2026 e 26/05/2026.
